text: Any party providing construction management, architectural, engineering, and/or  surveying  services,  and/or  any  party  whose  Work  or  Services involves the preparation of plans or drawings, must provide limits of not less than $2,000,000 per claim and $2,000,000 annual aggregate. Any party providing sheeting, shoring, excavating, structural steel,  concrete,  and/or curtainwall must provide limits of not less than $5,000,000 per claim and $10,000,000 annual aggregate.
